entries.meaning: kill two birds with one stone
entries.example: 她骑车上班，省了车费还锻炼了身体，一举两得。
entries.example_en: She bikes to work — saves on bus fare and gets exercise. Two birds, one stone.

entries.example: 方阿姨问老周蛋糕做得怎么样。老周说很好。小梅尝了一口，说：马马虎虎吧。老周说：那就是好的意思！
entries.example_en: Auntie Fang asked Old Zhou how the cake turned out. Zhou said great. Xiao Mei took one bite: so-so. Zhou said: that means it's good!

entries.example: 奶奶看着老照片，自言自语地说：那时候多好啊。
entries.example_en: Grandma looked at old photos, murmuring to herself: those were good times.

entries.meaning: when in Rome, do as the Romans do
entries.example: 他第一次去女朋友家吃饭，脱了鞋才进门——入乡随俗嘛。
entries.example_en: First time eating at his girlfriend's family home, he took off his shoes before entering — when in Rome.

entries.example: 老周说要每天跑步。第一天跑了五公里，发了朋友圈。第二天跑了两公里。第三天买了新跑鞋。第四天，跑鞋还在盒子里。方阿姨说：又半途而废了。老周说：我没放弃，我在调整策略。
entries.example_en: Old Zhou said he'd run every day. Day one: five km, posted it online. Day two: two km. Day three: bought new shoes. Day four: shoes still in the box. Auntie Fang: gave up halfway again. Zhou: I haven't quit — I'm adjusting my strategy.

entries.meaning: can't put it down; love it
entries.example: 弟弟收到新玩具，抱着睡觉都不肯放，真是爱不释手。
entries.example_en: Little brother got a new toy and wouldn't let go of it, even in bed — completely obsessed.

entries.example: 他一个人三天就把整个厨房装修好了，不可思议。
entries.example_en: He renovated the entire kitchen by himself in three days. Unbelievable.

entries.example: 别总想着一夜暴富，老王脚踏实地干了十年才开了自己的店。
entries.example_en: Stop dreaming of overnight riches — Old Wang worked steadily for ten years before opening his own shop.

entries.example: 爷爷说他第一次看到奶奶，就知道要娶她——一见钟情。
entries.example_en: Grandpa said the first time he saw grandma, he knew he'd marry her — love at first sight.

entries.example: 她一直找不到钥匙，后来摸了一下口袋，恍然大悟——原来一直在身上。
entries.example_en: She'd been looking everywhere for her keys, then patted her pocket — oh. They'd been on her all along.

entries.meaning: wait for a windfall; trust to luck
entries.example: 老周开了一个网店，上了三个产品，然后每天刷新页面看有没有人买。一个月了，零单。小梅说：你做推广了吗？老周说：好东西不需要推广。小梅说：那你为什么每天刷新？老周没说话。方阿姨说：守株待兔。
entries.example_en: Old Zhou opened an online shop, listed three products, then refreshed the page every day to check for orders. One month: zero sales. Xiao Mei: did you do any marketing? Zhou: good products don't need marketing. Mei: then why do you refresh every day? Zhou said nothing. Auntie Fang: waiting for a miracle.

entries.example: 罗老师写了一封道歉信，三百字，措辞完美。然后她加了一段解释为什么道歉本身也是一种艺术。秦经理看完说：前面很好。后面是画蛇添足。罗老师说：那一段是精华。
entries.example_en: Teacher Luo wrote an apology letter — three hundred words, perfectly phrased. Then she added a paragraph explaining why apologizing is itself an art form. Manager Qin read it: the first part was good. The rest was overdoing it. Luo said: that paragraph was the essence.

entries.example: 老白花了二十分钟给小梅讲他的茶道哲学。小梅听完说：所以你是说水要热。老白说对，但不只是热，是一种——小梅已经走了。方阿姨说：对牛弹琴。老白说：她不是牛，她是故意的。
entries.example_en: Uncle Bai spent twenty minutes explaining his tea philosophy to Xiao Mei. When he finished, Mei said: so you're saying the water should be hot. Bai said yes, but it's not just hot, it's a kind of — Mei had already left. Auntie Fang: casting pearls before swine. Bai: she's not a cow, she did that on purpose.

entries.example: 他没考上那个大学，结果去了另一所，遇到了现在的妻子。塞翁失马啊。
entries.example_en: He didn't get into that university, ended up at another, and met his wife there. Blessing in disguise.

entries.example: 虽然已经迟到了，但现在开始复习还来得及，亡羊补牢吧。
entries.example_en: It's late, sure, but start reviewing now — better late than never.

entries.example: 他买了一辆跑车，对他那样的收入来说，不过是九牛一毛。
entries.example_en: He bought a sports car — with his income, that's pocket change.

entries.example: 她一会儿想学画画，一会儿想学吉他，三心二意的。
entries.example_en: One minute she wants to learn painting, the next it's guitar — can't make up her mind.

entries.example: 那对双胞胎长得一模一样，连他们妈妈有时候都分不清。
entries.example_en: Those twins look exactly alike — even their mom mixes them up sometimes.

entries.example: 老周要做饭给大家吃。他先去买菜，忘了带钱包。回来拿钱包，忘了锁门。炒菜的时候放了两次盐。最后厨房乱七八糟的，菜也咸了。老周说：下次会更好。小梅说：不用了。
entries.example_en: Old Zhou wanted to cook for everyone. He went shopping, forgot his wallet. Came back for the wallet, forgot to lock the door. While cooking, added salt twice. The kitchen was a total mess, the food too salty. Zhou: next time will be better. Xiao Mei: no need.

entries.example: 小女孩蹲在地上，津津有味地看蚂蚁搬东西。
entries.example_en: The little girl squatted on the ground, watching the ants carry things with total fascination.

entries.example: 他十八岁就搬出去了，打工交房租，自食其力。
entries.example_en: He moved out at eighteen, worked to pay rent — supported himself.

entries.example: 秦经理问大家对新的考勤制度有没有意见。方阿姨、老周、小梅、罗老师、老白异口同声地说：没有。秦经理很满意。出了会议室，五个人异口同声地说：有。
entries.example_en: Manager Qin asked if anyone had objections to the new attendance policy. Fang, Zhou, Mei, Luo, and Bai said in unison: no. Qin was pleased. Outside the meeting room, all five said in unison: yes.

entries.meaning: stick to rigid ways in a changing world
entries.example: 十年前的菜单还在用，价格都没改过，老板真是刻舟求剑。
entries.example_en: Still using a menu from ten years ago, prices never updated — the owner is stuck in the past.

entries.example: 面试的时候她特别镇定，看得出来胸有成竹。
entries.example_en: She was completely calm during the interview — clearly had it all figured out.

entries.example: 爸爸从来不对女儿说不，她就是他的掌上明珠。
entries.example_en: Dad never says no to his daughter — she's the apple of his eye.

entries.example: 她关了手机，一心一意地准备明天的考试。
entries.example_en: She turned off her phone and focused completely on tomorrow's exam.

entries.example: 小李投篮特别准，同事们都说他百发百中。
entries.example_en: Xiao Li never misses a shot — coworkers say he hits every time.

entries.example: 妈妈给他报了五个课外班，望子成龙的心情可以理解。
entries.example_en: Mom signed him up for five after-school classes — you can understand a parent wanting the best.

entries.example: 楼下有人咳嗽一声，他就以为自己也感染了，杯弓蛇影。
entries.example_en: Someone coughed downstairs and he was sure he'd caught it too — pure paranoia.

entries.example: 她包饺子包了二十年，手一捏就好，熟能生巧。
entries.example_en: She's been making dumplings for twenty years — one pinch and it's done. Practice makes perfect.

entries.example: 过年的时候，在外面工作的人从四面八方赶回家。
entries.example_en: During Spring Festival, people working far away rush home from all directions.

entries.example: 罗老师发现打印机没纸了，站起来说：这怎么行！谁用完了不加纸！小梅看了她一眼，放了一包纸进去。罗老师说：谢谢，但这件事很严重。小梅说：大惊小怪。
entries.example_en: Teacher Luo discovered the printer was out of paper, stood up and declared: this is unacceptable! Who used the last sheet without refilling? Xiao Mei glanced at her, loaded a ream. Luo: thank you, but this is serious. Mei: making a fuss over nothing.

entries.example: 秦经理贴了通知：节约用纸，少打印。通知印了三页，彩色的，每层楼贴了两份。小梅数了一下：一共用了四十二张纸。秦经理说：宣传节约本身不算浪费。方阿姨说：自相矛盾。
entries.example_en: Manager Qin posted a notice: save paper, print less. The notice was three pages, in color, two copies per floor. Xiao Mei counted: forty-two sheets total. Qin said: promoting conservation doesn't count as waste. Auntie Fang: self-contradictory.

entries.meaning: half the effort, double the result
entries.example: 早上记单词比晚上快多了，事半功倍。
entries.example_en: Memorizing words in the morning is way faster than at night — half the effort, double the result.

entries.example: 老白从来没坐过飞机。他说：飞机有什么好的，火车也能到。方阿姨说：你去过海南吗？老白说：海南有什么好的，我们这里也有椰子。方阿姨没再说话。小梅小声说：井底之蛙。老白说：井里也挺好的。
entries.example_en: Uncle Bai had never flown. He said: what's so great about planes, trains get there too. Fang: have you been to Hainan? Bai: what's so great about Hainan, we have coconuts here too. Fang said nothing more. Mei whispered: frog in a well. Bai: the well's quite nice, actually.
